boundedOperations: real legacy database-pool initialization and close
actual compiled legacy ActionPlan store module import without invoking its lazy Prisma singleton
exact complete and VALID migration-ledger assertion for the reviewed migration identity, checksum, and appliedAt
connected PostgreSQL 18 server, expected database, and public schema assertions
validator-owned Prisma ActionPlan, Action, and ExecutionResult scalar reads inside a read-only transaction
Phase 2E schema-migration/command/run/event counts before and after
pre-Node injection guard, client disconnect, forced process exit, and process-resource check
sourceIdentity: The historical Phase 2D.1 application commit and the later validator artifact commit are separate evidence fields; Railway must report the configured exact validator commit.
serviceIdentity: A recreated validator must match separately configured expected service ID/name values and Railway system identity.
limitation: Module import plus direct bounded Prisma reads is not complete legacy repository-operation or full application-startup compatibility; this evidence cannot clear Gate D.
